enum ConnectionState {
    Disconnected,
    Connected {
        encrypted: bool,
        compressed: bool,
    },
    Authenticated {
        encrypted: bool,
        compressed: bool,
    },
}

impl ConnectionState {
    fn new() -> Self {
        ConnectionState::Disconnected
    }

    fn connect(self) -> Self {
        match self {
            ConnectionState::Disconnected => ConnectionState::Connected {
                encrypted: false,
                compressed: false,
            },
            other => other,
        }
    }

    fn authenticate(self) -> Self {
        match self {
            ConnectionState::Connected { encrypted, compressed } => {
                ConnectionState::Authenticated { encrypted, compressed }
            }
            other => other,
        }
    }

    fn set_encryption(self, enabled: bool) -> Self {
        match self {
            ConnectionState::Connected { compressed, .. } => {
                ConnectionState::Connected { encrypted: enabled, compressed }
            }
            ConnectionState::Authenticated { compressed, .. } => {
                ConnectionState::Authenticated { encrypted: enabled, compressed }
            }
            other => other,
        }
    }

    fn status(&self) -> String {
        match self {
            ConnectionState::Disconnected => "disconnected".into(),
            ConnectionState::Connected { encrypted, compressed } => {
                format!("connected encrypted={encrypted} compressed={compressed}")
            }
            ConnectionState::Authenticated { encrypted, compressed } => {
                format!("authenticated encrypted={encrypted} compressed={compressed}")
            }
        }
    }
}
